query:
-- Check ALL triggers across all schemas
SELECT 
  trigger_schema,
  trigger_name, 
  event_manipulation, 
  event_object_schema, 
  event_object_table,
  action_statement
FROM information_schema.triggers
ORDER BY event_object_schema, event_object_table;
